commandsRun: DATABASE_URL=... pnpm --filter @cdp/tests exec vitest run integration
result.notes: AC1 tenant isolation: two workspaces share external_id+email; event via key A only affects A (A total_events=2, B=1; A plan=gold, B=silver); processor runs on adminPool (service-role bypass) so isolation is in-code (workspace_id $1 + (workspace_id,external_id)). AC2 ordering: created->progress AND progress-first both converge to ONE profile, total_events=2, profile_created attrs merged onto stub. AC3 idempotency: replaying same event_id leaves total_events=1, monetary_total=40, one events row. AC4 segment enter/exit: realtime 'total_events < 3' segment -> event1 enters (1 membership, change_log ['entered']), event2 no change, event3 exits (0 membership, ['entered','exited']); workspace B with same external_id never enters A's segment. Used REAL cores (no re-implementation); added root test:integration script. Bootstrap applies migrations only if schema absent (DB already migrated). Unique workspace UUIDs + event_id namespace. NOTE: original integration agent dropped on a transient socket error after writing only tests/package.json dep additions; orchestrator completed the test file directly and verified.
result.testSummary: Cross-phase integration suite (tests/integration/foundation-pipeline.integration.test.ts) 4 tests green against REAL Postgres, driving the actual production cores end-to-end: ingest (resolveWorkspaceId+buildProfileUpsert+buildSqsMessage) -> SQS message body (SQS mocked at boundary) -> processor (parseProcessorMessage->planProcessing) -> runPlanInWorkspaceTx (event insert + profile upsert + feature aggregates + realtime segment re-eval). Full cold suite 29/29 turbo tasks green TWICE (0 cached), no regression. typecheck + lint exit 0.
